rows.description: Total
rows.notes: Visual override and conversion. The ledger shows '217 . 18 . 99'. Applying standard conversion rules (99 pence = 8 shillings 3 pence; then 18 shillings + 8 shillings = 26 shillings; and 26 shillings = 1 pound 6 shillings) results in a final total of 218 pounds, 6 shillings, 3 pence. gemini-flash's reported 29 pence violated the hard rule and was therefore disqualified. gpt-5-mini misread '99' as '9' pence.
